title: React Developer
responsibilities: build reusable frontend components; integrate REST and GraphQL APIs; improve page performance and accessibility
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in react, javascript, typescript, html, css. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: NovaSoft is hiring a junior react developer to support building responsive product interfaces and reusable UI components.
raw_text: Vacancy V001: React Developer at NovaSoft. Location: Remote. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 0.5 years. Required skills: react, javascript, typescript, html, css, redux, next.js. Optional skills: storybook, figma. Responsibilities: build reusable frontend components; integrate REST and GraphQL APIs; improve page performance and accessibility.
